narrative:
Tallmadge 4-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,068 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.8 percentage points.
